content.text: Reply 1 posted. Now the remaining 4 in parallel.

input.command: gh api repos/gunk-dev/flux/pulls/66/comments/3258697154/replies -f body='Added a dbPutMany helper that opens a single readwrite transaction and a matching putLogEntries wrapper; the import loop now collects sanitized entries and writes the whole batch in one transaction.'

gh api repos/gunk-dev/flux/pulls/66/comments/3258697157/replies -f body='Removed the local clearInterval wrapper entirely and inlined its body as the useEffect cleanup — no more shadow of the global, and one fewer indirection.'

gh api repos/gunk-dev/flux/pulls/66/comments/3258697161/replies -f body='Added buildLatestWeightedMap which does the O(N) scan once and returns a Map<exercise, entry>; Workouts memoizes it per log and suggestWeight/getLastWeight now take the precomputed entry, dropping render cost from O(M*N) to O(M).'

gh api repos/gunk-dev/flux/pulls/66/comments/3258697166/replies -f body='Simplified to if (meaningless). With options.remove now folded into meaningless and the remove branch unconditional, the redundant secondary checks are gone.'

content.text:
All 5 review comments addressed in commit `377f894`, pushed to `agent/20260518-0746-551c`. Replies posted on every comment.

Summary of changes:
- **Workouts/index.tsx** — `onLog` computes the merged entry once, then setLog stays a pure functional update and DB writes fire afterward; redundant `meaningless && !…` guard collapsed to `if (meaningless)`; render uses the new precomputed weights map.
- **logic/progression.ts** — new `buildLatestWeightedMap`; `suggestWeight`/`getLastWeight` now take a precomputed entry instead of rescanning the log, so render is O(M) not O(M·N).
- **db/idb.ts + state.ts** — new `dbPutMany` / `putLogEntries` for single-transaction bulk writes.
- **logic/exportImport.ts** — import path collects entries and writes them in one transaction.
- **components/Timer.tsx** — dropped the shadowing local `clearInterval` and inlined the cleanup.

Build and all 5 Playwright tests pass.

result:
All 5 review comments addressed in commit `377f894`, pushed to `agent/20260518-0746-551c`. Replies posted on every comment.

Summary of changes:
- **Workouts/index.tsx** — `onLog` computes the merged entry once, then setLog stays a pure functional update and DB writes fire afterward; redundant `meaningless && !…` guard collapsed to `if (meaningless)`; render uses the new precomputed weights map.
- **logic/progression.ts** — new `buildLatestWeightedMap`; `suggestWeight`/`getLastWeight` now take a precomputed entry instead of rescanning the log, so render is O(M) not O(M·N).
- **db/idb.ts + state.ts** — new `dbPutMany` / `putLogEntries` for single-transaction bulk writes.
- **logic/exportImport.ts** — import path collects entries and writes them in one transaction.
- **components/Timer.tsx** — dropped the shadowing local `clearInterval` and inlined the cleanup.

Build and all 5 Playwright tests pass.
